last_session_summary: Typography unified to DS classful patterns. Blog module CSS rewritten (8 custom classes removed, reduced-motion added). 28 hand-crafted heading utility stacks (ds-font-display + ds-text-Xxl + ds-font-bold + ds-text-primary) replaced with ds-section-title / ds-heading-ui / ds-hero-title / ds-stat-number / ds-overline across public landing, property pages, account pages, admin pages, blog pages. 8 phantom DS classes fixed (ds-whitespace-pre-line, ds-gap-y/x, ds-lg:grid-cols-6, ds-ml-1, ds-md:items-stretch, ds-md:py-24). DS_CUSTOM.md ds-ops-suppress block added for photo-overlay zones. Cross-repo: Inspector regex updated (COMPONENT_RE + LAYOUT_RE line-clamp), Prodigy DS_CUSTOM.md suppression loader added, hook ds-no-hardcoded-font-weight.sh extended to .tsx. Build green 81/81. Inspector P0 182→130 (−28), Prodigy 18→4.
notes: Typography unification complete 2026-04-11. blog.css is now layout-only BEM — zero font-size/weight/leading/tracking. 28 heading soup sites eliminated across the whole frontend. ds-stat-number now used for property price displays. Hero uses canonical ds-hero__title + ds-hero-title combination per DS source example. Photo-overlay components (vip-hero-search, vip-favorite-btn, vip-lightbox) justified hardcoded colors remain, now formally suppressed in Prodigy via DS_CUSTOM.md ds-ops-suppress block. Pre-existing 130 Inspector P0 findings are layout/spacing soup (not typography) — tracked separately. ds-react adoption still 0% in esys — candidate for next sweep (Flex/Stack/Grid/Text/Center/Label would collapse many of the pre-existing layout soups).
